mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ANIMAL VALUES ( 'A' || SEQ_ANIMAL_ID.NEXTVAL, #{animalName}, #{speciesId}, #{zoneId}, #{keeperId}, #{gender}, #{weightKg}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT ANIMAL_ID, ANIMAL_NAME, SPECIES_NAME speciesID, ZONE_NAME zoneId, NVL(KEEPER_NAME, '없음') keeperId, GENDER, WEIGHT_KG, BIRTH_DATE, ARRIVAL_DATE FROM ANIMAL JOIN SPECIES USING(SPECIES_ID) JOIN ZONE USING(ZONE_ID) LEFT JOIN KEEPER USING(KEEPER_ID) ORDER BY ANIMAL_ID DESC
